title: Big Mom’s Broken Memory
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Big Mom, Unknown person #6, Charlotte Linlin, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as Big Mom’s past explains the emotional weakness that the assassination plan tries to exploit.
scene: Big Mom’s childhood reveals the loss and confusion behind her obsession with Mother Carmel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Lord Mount- Beard!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Linlin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Snoooore...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Please! Mercy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You dare to stop me,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Caramel?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yorle... is a battle comrade I fought alongside for... 300 years!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: At his age... He is beyond saving!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Warriors care not how long they live, but how they die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I cannot forgive this child.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I understand! But even if you cannot forgive her,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Linlin is like the other poor children in the lamb's house. Abandoned by the world, with no- where to go.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I can't just leave her to die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I will take this girl

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And leave this country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Cara- Mel?!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Lord Mountbeard! Kill Linlin!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How far has the pride of Elbaf fallen?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hajru- Din!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Then be quick about it. Disappear

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: From my sight!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The hero of the giants, yorle, had died. The existence of the demon Linlin. And caramel's miracle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The events of that day

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Huh? What happened?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Lord fallbeard died?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Spread as if on wings through even the few, scattered kingdoms of giants across the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As they were unwilling to leave mother's side, she took the children of the lamb's house in tow,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and, with Charlotte Linlin, who had earned the full ice of the giant race, in tow,

dialogue.speaker: Charlotte Linlin
dialogue.text: mother caramel left Elbaf behind.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A new life at a new lamb's house begun.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is this okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yes, that's plenty.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are mother to the giant race too, caramel.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To be honest, we'd rather not look at Linlin's face, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You can always rely on us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Thank you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to brighten the clouds of worry that darkened the hearts of the children,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: caramel's smile never once fall- Tered.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and after but a few days, everything had returned to normal.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wait, wait!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: KyaAH! Linlin's gonna kill us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The sounds of the childrens' laughter echoed throughout the lamb's house.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The Lamb's house was known thus:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Any and all problem chili- Dren would be "reborn" under the mother's miraculous power.

dialogue.speaker: Giants
dialogue.text: I never thought you'd leave Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Eventually, they would meet nice foster parents.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was pre- pared to do even that to prevent that kid from getting away.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Think about it! At the age of 5, she managed to half-destroy the village of Elbaf! She's irreplaceable!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But this price...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: DON'T TELL ME YOU CAN'T PAY IT!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In terms of marine ranks, this one's cut out to be an Admiral or even fleet Admiral.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All you CP types care about is providing enough protection to the tenryubito, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then let me tell you, as a child slaver for 50 years... this is my greatest product yet!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 37 years ago I pulled a fast one on the Marines and slipped into Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed, the reason the first giant marine sol- deer, John Giant,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: is because of my con- neckions.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been deceiving those kids in the lamb's house year after year.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And once every two years, I sell one orphan to the government.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These kids are perfect for spies. No one can track down where orphans are from.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fine, fine, I get it! I'll get the money together, somehow! (Ongodq!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Tea Party storyline with 60 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s past reframes her weakness and the emotional core of the failed assassination plan.
